verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Baptize us with Your Love, Enfold us with Your peace, Uplift us with Your joy, Unite us by Your Spirit.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Lord, we long to please You To glorify and bless You, So we humbly say, Father, have Your perfect way.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Forgive us for our sin, Cleanse us from within, Purify our hearts, Conform us to Your likeness.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: In all of our ways, Through each and every day, May we be Your hands, Reaching out to save the world.
